creator: jkramer@mark17.net
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #3)
> FYI, I just discussed this portmanager.  
> 
> They agree a port should not be revived without a maintainer.  So, no
> pressure, but if you decline to be a maintainer or don't respond at all,
> this PR will be closed without action.
> 
> If I don't hear back within a week, I'll close the PR.
> Thanks

Sorry, I don't know much more about the ports system than how to install and delete ports, so I don't see myself capable of maintaining a port.
